# Copilot Instructions for Game Guesser

## Project Overview

Video game timeline guessing party game (Hitster-inspired). Players guess when
games were released by placing cards on a timeline. Built with Next.js (App
Router, TypeScript), Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui, Supabase, and deployed on
Vercel.

## Knowledge Base

This project is managed by an AI Agent Development System.
Always start at the KB entry point and follow links:

## Coding Rules

Follow the web stack coding rules for TypeScript, Next.js, and Supabase

## Key Rules

- **Stop after each story:** Do not continue to the next story without human instruction.
- **Read files first:** Always read a file before editing it.
- **No technical debt:** If you see code not following the coding rules, fix it immediately.
